component.layout: Page layout container with support for header, footer, and sidebar areas.
component.layoutHeader: Page header navigation bar, commonly used for logo, menu, and user info.
component.layoutContent: Main content area that fills remaining space automatically.
component.layoutFooter: Page footer for copyright or auxiliary information.
component.floatButton: Floating action button fixed to the viewport, often used for feedback or back-to-top actions.
component.floatButtonGroup: Grouped floating action buttons for bundling multiple quick actions together.
component.typography: Typography primitives for titles, text, links, and paragraph content.
component.tabsTabPane: Content pane rendered inside a tab.
component.space: Spacing helper for applying consistent gaps between components.
component.spaceCompact: Compact grouping for tightly arranged components.
component.skeleton: Skeleton placeholder shown while content is loading.
component.row: Grid row used together with Col for layout composition.
component.col: Grid column that must be nested inside Row to divide horizontal space.
component.flex: Flex layout container for alignment, spacing, and wrapping.
component.divider: Divider line for separating content blocks.
component.anchor: Anchor component for jumping to a specific section on the page.
component.breadcrumb: Breadcrumb navigation showing the current page hierarchy.
component.dropdown: Dropdown menu that expands into a list of actions.
component.menu: Navigation menu for pages and features.
component.pagination: Pagination control for splitting long lists into pages.
component.steps: Step indicator that guides users through a multi-step flow.
component.button: Button component for triggering business logic or user interactions.
component.table: Table component for displaying row and column data.
component.formItem: Form item containing label and input control.
